system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.27, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r4c5 is in critical collapse risk and must receive priority support; r3c5 is now also at moderate risk and can only afford modest, carefully-gated sharing to avoid mutual failure..
